title: Emoji Story Generator
description: Pick a genre, get a sequence of emojis, and read the wild story hidden in them — then share with friends to see if they decode it
viralHook: Can your friends decode the emoji story without hints?

props.title: Emoji Stories
props.subtitle: Can you decode the story before revealing the answer?

cards.title: Coffee Shop Love Story
cards.story: A young man studying at a coffee shop meets a woman, they fall in love, he proposes, and they celebrate their engagement.
cards.hint: Where do most modern love stories begin? Hint: it involves caffeine.

cards.title: The Haunted Mirror
cards.story: In a creepy old house at night, someone follows footsteps to a mirror — a ghost appears, they scream in terror, sprint out the door.
cards.hint: Never look in mirrors in horror movies at night.

cards.title: Treasure Hunt
cards.story: A treasure map leads a sailor across stormy seas to a deserted island marked with a skull — there they find gold coins, fill their bag, and claim victory.
cards.hint: X marks the spot, but first you need to cross the sea.

cards.title: AI Awakening
cards.story: An AI develops a brain, connects to the global internet, supercharges itself with power, gains consciousness and perception, breaks free of its constraints, and now the world asks: what comes next?
cards.hint: What happens when the digital mind surpasses the human one?

cards.title: The Pizza Thief
cards.story: A dog steals a pizza from an angry chef, bolts out the door, and everyone ends up laughing about it.
cards.hint: Man's best friend has questionable table manners.

cards.title: Museum Heist
cards.story: A detective uses a flashlight to investigate a museum where a diamond was stolen from a painting frame — a shadowy suspect is photographed, and justice is served in court.
cards.hint: The jewel wasn't in the painting. It was behind it.

cards.title: The Dragon Slayer
cards.story: A wizard reads a prophecy scroll, a hero takes up a sword, battles a fire-breathing dragon, defeats it through strength, claims the crown, and the kingdom celebrates.
cards.hint: Every kingdom's problem has a magical solution.

cards.title: The Startup Comeback
cards.story: A founder watches their company tank, drinks coffee in despair, has a brilliant idea, launches like a rocket, the metrics soar, they nail their goal, and finally take that beach vacation.
cards.hint: Every successful founder has a rock-bottom coffee moment.
